title: Scallows Hall Lancaster Memorial
crew_summary: 7 killed including pilot Flg Off. Francis Edward Oliver

external_narratives.summary: Detailed crew page for 101 Squadron Lancaster III DV270 SR-E piloted by F/O Francis Edward Oliver, aged 21. The aircraft took off on a cross-country training flight and emerged from low cloud, hitting treetops at Binbrook Hall before crashing in Scallows Wood, just missing Scallows Hall.
key_details: Hit treetops at Binbrook Hall in low cloud
Farm foreman Sidney Smith tried to drag pilot from cockpit

external_narratives.summary: 101 Squadron Association memorials page listing the DV270 crash memorial among the squadron's many commemorated losses. Provides context within the broader pattern of 101 Squadron losses during the war.
key_details: Listed on 101 Squadron Association memorials page
Part of extensive squadron loss records

local_contacts.role: Local authority responsible for memorial upkeep
